site.name: Toolsset
site.tagline: Browser-side utilities for text, data, and media. Nothing leaves your device unless you choose to.

home.introTitle: A calm workspace for small tools
home.introBody: Each tool runs in your browser. We do not upload your inputs to our servers by default — check each page for specifics.
home.ctaSoon: Tools ship incrementally; the repo tracks progress in /docs.
home.toolsPlaceholder: Sample tool shell: /tools/template (localized under /{locale}/tools/template). Add real slugs under src/app/[locale]/tools/ as each ships.

template.title: Tool page template
template.description: Blank route using ToolPageLayout — copy this folder when adding a real tool at tools/{slug}.
template.body: Keep this layout as a Server Component shell; put editors, tabs, and file handling in child Client components.

privacy.title: Privacy & local processing
privacy.description: How this site handles your data by default.
privacy.lead: This overview applies across the site. Individual tools may add tool-specific notices later.
paragraphs: By default, inputs you paste or upload in our browser-side tools are processed in your tab. We do not receive your raw content unless a tool explicitly states otherwise.
We may collect typical server logs (such as page requests) needed to operate the site. Retention and legal bases will be documented here as the product matures.
Contact channels will be listed on this page when available.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.description: Placeholder terms of service for Toolsset.
terms.lead: This page is a legal placeholder. Replace with counsel-reviewed terms before public marketing or payments.
paragraphs: No warranties are granted for the accuracy of browser-side tools; outputs may differ by browser or device.
You agree not to misuse the service (including attempting to disrupt infrastructure or violate applicable law).
We may update these terms; the revision date will appear here once a formal process exists.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.description: How Toolsset uses cookies and similar storage.
cookies.lead: Placeholder policy. Expand when analytics, auth, or cross-site embeds are introduced.
paragraphs: Essential cookies (if any) are used only to operate the site, such as remembering UI preferences you explicitly save.
We do not run third-party advertising cookies in this baseline. Revisit this page before enabling ads or trackers.
Use your browser settings to block or delete cookies; some features may stop working if you do.
